description_long: This is a modern-style bungalow set within a rectangular plot bordered by a low hedge and lined with tall, slender trees. The building features a flat roof with a raised central section, and its exterior is finished in a combination of dark and light materials, with prominent rectangular windows and a front porch area. The front facade is defined by a covered entryway and a paved path leading from the street, flanked by two trees. The rear and side elevations display a mix of solid wall sections and large windows, with the rear showing a more private, windowed area. The landscaping is minimalistic, with evenly spaced trees and a well-maintained lawn. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a functional, open layout typical of contemporary urban residences.
description: A modern flat-roofed bungalow with a mix of dark and light exterior finishes, large windows, and a landscaped yard bordered by hedges and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and a paved path flanked by trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, raised central section, and a mix of window and wall surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view with a large window and more solid wall sections, offering privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing multiple windows and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
